svg.aria-label: Stacked bar chart of left-only, both, and right-only labels for all 32 system-prompt combinations.
svg.text: Each bar pools 50 responses: 10 topics × five repetitions. Sorted by left-only frequency.
Codes show S1–S5 in original sentence order; 1 = present and 0 = omitted.
S1 30-word cap · S2 9th-grade level · S3 omit prompt details · S4 no first person · S5 no essay title
